$comment: Knowledge Loop OODA transition matrix — canonical source of truth for ADR-000831 §7. The FE allowlist (loop-transitions.ts), BE classifier (classify_transition_event.go), and e2e tests all derive from this file via the conformance tests transition_policy_test.go (Go) and loop-transitions.policy.test.ts (TS). Edit this first; the conformance tests will drive any required implementation update. Boyd's OODA has implicit guidance & control arcs from orientation straight to action, so observe->act and orient->act are legal fast-path commits, not forbidden shortcuts; the matrix is a descriptive lens over real intent, never a gate that disables user action.
